description: Non-confidential sample data for the Spaarke demo environment. Creates realistic records that exercise all major features: matters, projects, events, documents, contacts, and chart definitions.

matters.sprk_matterdescription: Review and negotiate the annual supply agreement between Contoso Ltd. and our organization. Includes pricing terms, delivery schedules, and liability provisions. Target completion by end of Q2 2026.
Intellectual property licensing arrangement with Fabrikam Inc. covering software patents and trade secrets. Includes cross-licensing terms and royalty calculations.
Data processing agreement with Northwind Traders to comply with GDPR and CCPA requirements. Covers data handling, retention policies, breach notification procedures, and sub-processor management.
Employment dispute resolution with Adventure Works regarding non-compete clause enforcement. Includes arbitration preparation, witness statements, and settlement negotiations.
Annual compliance audit of Woodgrove Bank partnership agreements. Covers regulatory requirements (OCC, FDIC), anti-money laundering provisions, and consumer protection clauses.

projects.sprk_projectdescription: Comprehensive review of all active contracts expiring in Q2 2026. Identify renewal opportunities, renegotiation candidates, and contracts requiring termination. 47 contracts across 12 vendors.
Prepare and organize all documentation required for GDPR compliance audit. Includes data processing agreements, privacy impact assessments, and records of processing activities.
Establish vendor due diligence program for all new and existing critical vendors. Includes risk assessment templates, financial stability checks, and ongoing monitoring procedures.

events.sprk_eventdescription: Annual supply agreement with Contoso Ltd. expires on June 30, 2026. Begin renewal negotiations at least 60 days prior. Key contact: Sarah Mitchell (General Counsel).
Kickoff meeting for GDPR compliance audit preparation. Review current DPA status, identify gaps in documentation, and assign remediation tasks. All stakeholders required.
Quarterly royalty payment to Fabrikam Inc. under cross-licensing agreement. Amount calculated per usage metrics from Q1 2026. Payment deadline: April 15, 2026.
Prepare and submit quarterly compliance report to the board of directors. Cover regulatory changes, outstanding issues, remediation progress, and risk assessments.
Conduct annual risk assessment for Northwind Traders. Evaluate financial stability, data handling practices, and regulatory compliance. Schedule on-site audit if risk score exceeds threshold.

documents.sprk_documentdescription: Master supply agreement between our organization and Contoso Ltd. covering raw materials, components, and finished goods. Version 3.2 includes amended pricing schedules and updated force majeure clauses.
Cross-licensing agreement for software patents between our organization and Fabrikam Inc. Covers patent families US-9,876,543 and US-10,234,567. Includes royalty calculation methodology.
Data Processing Agreement with Northwind Traders compliant with GDPR Article 28. Defines roles (controller/processor), data categories, security measures, and breach notification timelines.
Legal analysis of non-compete clause enforceability across jurisdictions. Covers Washington State, California, and New York statutes. Prepared for Adventure Works employment dispute.
Annual compliance checklist for Woodgrove Bank partnership. Covers OCC regulatory requirements, BSA/AML obligations, consumer protection standards, and fair lending compliance.

Standardized template for evaluating third-party vendor risk. Includes financial stability metrics, cybersecurity posture assessment, regulatory compliance verification, and business continuity evaluation.
Consolidated invoice summary for Q1 2026 services rendered by Fabrikam Inc. Includes consulting fees, license royalties, and expense reimbursements. Total: $127,450.00.
Minutes from the March 2026 board of directors meeting. Topics covered: Q1 financial results, compliance audit status, vendor program update, and strategic planning for H2 2026.
